title: gymnadenia conopsea var. ornithis
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea var. ornithis, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a rare and endemic orchid species found in the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to be responsible for its health benefits, including antioxidant, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. Gymnadenia conopsea var. ornithis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are typically used to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
